text.title: Supabase RLS Audit Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the app multi-tenant OR multi-user with row ownership?

text.example: Multi-tenant SaaS with two-tenant fixture → enumerate tables, check policies, run fixture test, emit report.
